profile.name: Saravanan
profile.title: Senior Technical Consultant
profile.summary:
SAPUI5 / Fiori Developer with 6+ years of experience specializing in SAPUI5 Freestyle application development and SAP Fiori architecture. Strong expertise in building custom enterprise applications integrated with SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business One, and SAP Business ByDesign using OData services. Experienced in SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry), CAP model development, and SAP HANA Cloud. Skilled in designing scalable, responsive, role-based Fiori applications with end-to-end backend integration.

Primary expertise in SAPUI5 Freestyle development with working knowledge of SAP Fiori Elements (List Report, Object Page, etc..).

details: Designed and developed SAPUI5 Freestyle applications for SAP S/4HANA business processes.
Built and consumed OData services for real-time integration with S/4HANA modules (Sales, Customer Master, Product Master).
Developed custom UI5 components, reusable fragments, and dynamic forms based on business requirements.
Implemented role-based Fiori applications following SAP UX guidelines.
Deployed applications on SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry) using CAP-based services.
Worked on Fiori Elements templates (List Report and Object Page) for metadata-driven applications.
Optimized performance using efficient model binding, batch processing, and backend query tuning.

education.institution: GANADIPATHY Tulsi's Jain Engineering College - AFFILIATED WITH ANNA University, Vellore, Tamil Nadu

projects.title: Landmark - Point of Sale (POS) Application
projects.description:
Enterprise-grade POS application enabling retail employees to:
- Create quick sales orders and generate billing documents
- Preview and review receipts before final confirmation
- Maintain Customer Master data
- Create quotations and convert them into Sales Orders
- View Product Master details
- Check plant-level stock availability in real-time
projects.contributions:
Developed fully custom SAPUI5 Freestyle UI optimized for fast retail transactions.
Integrated with SAP S/4HANA Sales and Distribution (SD) module via OData services.
Implemented real-time stock validation using plant-level availability checks.
Designed responsive layout for high-speed counter operations.
Enhanced user experience by minimizing navigation steps and improving data validation.

projects.title: Lighthouse - Shipping Management Application
projects.description:
Built responsive SAPUI5 interfaces for shipment and vessel tracking.
Developed CAP-based backend services deployed on SAP BTP.
Integrated OData services for seamless backend communication.
projects.contributions:
Built responsive SAPUI5 interfaces for shipment and vessel tracking.
Developed CAP-based backend services deployed on SAP BTP.
Integrated OData services for seamless backend communication.

projects.title: PropertyZone - Property Management Solution
projects.description:
Developed custom SAPUI5 components for lease and sales management.
Integrated S/4HANA using OData APIs.
Implemented role-based UI and dynamic filtering.
projects.contributions:
Developed custom SAPUI5 components for lease and sales management.
Integrated S/4HANA using OData APIs.
Implemented role-based UI and dynamic filtering.

projects.title: PAYROLL
projects.description:
Designed SAPUI5-based payroll interface.
Developed backend logic using CAP and HANA SQL.
Automated tax calculation and payslip generation.
projects.contributions:
Designed SAPUI5-based payroll interface.
Developed backend logic using CAP and HANA SQL.
Automated tax calculation and payslip generation.

projects.title: SHOPPING CART
projects.description:
Built responsive UI for product browsing, cart management, and invoice generation.
Integrated backend services for order processing.
Optimized performance for web and mobile users.
projects.contributions:
Built responsive UI for product browsing, cart management, and invoice generation.
Integrated backend services for order processing.
Optimized performance for web and mobile users.
